title: University of Chicago Law School Bans Devices Amid AI Cheating Concerns
blurb: Pen and paper return to first-year classes as one law school rethinks how students learn—and where AI fits in.

title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 With Three Tiers and Stronger Cybersecurity Gains
blurb: Three model tiers, a parallel-agent "ultra" mode, and cybersecurity scores that jumped 25 points. Verified access starts September 1.

title: Publishers Sue Google, Alleging Gemini Was Trained on Copyrighted Works
blurb: Publishers say Google reused their searchable books to train Gemini—and hid the evidence.
